MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DILIP R. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-07-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 08 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON APR-13-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESTES, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 868 VALENCIA ST. #6, SF., STAYED UNTIL MAY-03-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, EXECUTION OF WRIT STAYED TO 5/3/94,5PM. PLTF WAIVES ALL BACK RENT IF DEFT VACATES TIMELY. IF NOT, PLTF TO HAVE JUDGMENT FOR $1749.12. IF DEFT COMPLIES WITH TERMS, PLTF TO FILE A STIP TO VACATE & DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. SEE FILE.
